name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: Orlando, FL's ACE Cash Express at 1523 S Crystal Lake Dr offers payday loans, title loans, and check cashing services.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express in Orlando, FL is conveniently located at 1523 S Crystal Lake Dr, a standalone storefront serving the Crystal Lake neighborhood and surrounding areas. The branch is open Monday through Friday from 9:00 AM to 7:00 PM, and Saturday from 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM, with Sunday hours closed. This location makes it easy for Orlando residents to access financial services during weekday business hours or Saturday morning.

This Orlando branch offers payday loans, title loans, installment loans, check cashing, and money transfers. The team at this Crystal Lake location is trained to help you understand your borrowing options and complete your application efficiently. For specific questions about rates, terms, or to discuss your financial needs, call this Orlando location at 407-893-6484.

If you're an Orlando resident facing an unexpected expense or cash flow challenge, ACE Cash Express can provide funds quickly when you need them. Bring a valid government-issued ID, proof of income such as a recent paystub, and a blank check or bank statement to streamline your application. The professional team at this South Orlando location works respectfully with the community to meet diverse financial needs.
address: 1523 S Crystal Lake Dr, Orlando, FL 32806

pricing.guarantee_details: No money-back guarantee found. Short-term loan and check cashing transactions are fee-based with no refund policy identified.

tiers.name: Payday Loan (per transaction)
features: Late payment fee: 5% of payment or $7.50 (whichever is greater, if 10+ days late)

tiers.name: Check Cashing (per transaction)
features: Fee varies by state and check type
Payroll, government, personal, and business checks accepted

certifications: FDIC-backed products via Pathward, National Association
Visa licensed issuer (prepaid debit via Pathward)

pros: Founded in 1968 — over 55 years operating in alternative financial services
600+ retail locations nationwide offer in-person access without requiring a bank account
Loans and check cashing available both online and in-store for flexibility
FDIC-backed prepaid and banking products through Pathward, National Association
A+ BBB rating across multiple location profiles
Bundled services under one roof: loans, check cashing, tax prep, money orders, bill pay
cons: Payday loan fees of ~$25 per $100 borrowed translate to APRs routinely exceeding 300%
CFPB has cited the company as a repeat enforcement offender — formal regulatory action on record
Check cashing fees of 2–6% are costly compared to free alternatives at traditional banks
Service availability and rates vary significantly by state — not all products offered everywhere
No nonprofit affiliation, CDFI certification, or low-APR alternative loan products
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers who need same-day cash without a traditional bank account
Consumers needing to cash checks (payroll, government, personal) without a bank account
People in short-term financial emergencies who cannot qualify for traditional bank loans or credit cards
Consumers seeking multiple financial services (tax prep, money orders, wire transfers, bill pay) in a single physical location
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best suited for unbanked or underbanked consumers who need immediate cash or check cashing services and have no viable traditional banking alternative. The main caveat is cost: payday loan fees translate to extremely high APRs, and the company has faced repeated CFPB enforcement actions — consumers who can qualify for a credit union payday alternative loan (PAL) or personal loan should exhaust those options first.
services: Check cashing (payroll, government, personal, business checks)
ACE Elite Visa Prepaid Card (via Netspend/Ouro, backed by Pathward)
meta_description: ACE Cash Express at 1523 S Crystal Lake Dr, Orlando, FL. Fast payday and title loans available.
